en_title: 'I'll Do a Time Capsule for Them': How Long Will Hugh Jackman Play Wolverine? Marvel Star Suggests There's No Need to Think About Handing Over The Role Just Yet
cn_title: 休·杰克曼还不急着交出金刚狼
subtitle: 演到九十岁？
opus_summary: 漫威正在推进《X战警》重启，但休·杰克曼暗示自己暂时不会告别金刚狼。他开玩笑说要演到90岁，并会给未来接任者留下一个「小时间胶囊」。

paragraphs.en: X-Men star Hugh Jackman has suggested he won't be done playing Wolverine anytime soon.
paragraphs.cn: 《X战警》主演休·杰克曼暗示，自己不会很快结束金刚狼的演出。

paragraphs.en: With Marvel moving forward on a full X-Men reboot , and speculation pointing to our first new X-Men hero popping up sooner rather than later , fans have wondered whether a new actor will also be brought in as a fresh version of Logan.
paragraphs.cn: 随着漫威推进完整的《X战警》重启，而传闻又指向首位新版《X战警》英雄可能很快亮相，粉丝一直在猜测，是否也会有一位新演员以新版Logan的身份加入。

paragraphs.en: At least for now, however, that doesn't sound like it's the case, with Jackman pointing to the (jokingly made) suggestion in Deadpool & Wolverine that he'll be playing the fan-favorite character until he's 90, and will make a "little time capsule" for whoever does take on the role next.
paragraphs.cn: 不过至少现在听起来并非如此。杰克曼提到了《死侍与金刚狼》中那句玩笑式说法：他会一直演这个粉丝喜爱的角色演到90岁，并为下一位接手该角色的人准备一个「小时间胶囊」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to PBS , Jackman commented: "I'm 57. I'm doing it till I'm 90. So, you know... I'll do a little time capsule for them."
paragraphs.cn: 杰克曼在接受PBS采访时说：「我57岁了。我要演到90岁。所以，你懂的……我会给他们做一个小时间胶囊。」

paragraphs.en: While Jackman has not officially confirmed if or when he will return as the adamantium-clawed superhero, fans fully expect he will portray Wolverine again in either or both of the upcoming Avengers: Doomsday and Avengers: Secret Wars , as well as any Deadpool sequel.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然杰克曼尚未正式确认自己是否会、以及何时会回归饰演这位拥有艾德曼合金利爪的超级英雄，但粉丝普遍期待他会在接下来的《复仇者联盟：末日》《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》之一或两部中再次出演金刚狼，也可能出现在任何《死侍》续集中。

paragraphs.en: Jackman famously suggested he was done with playing Wolverine after 2017's Logan, but later walked this back to return to the character alongside Ryan Reynolds' Deadpool. And, of course, Deadpool & Wolverine went on to generate over a $1 billion for Marvel, and its star Ryan Reynolds has already discussed having ideas for a team-based follow-up. So, surely, Logan's Wolverine will be back in the mix as well.
paragraphs.cn: 众所周知，杰克曼曾在2017年的《金刚狼3：殊死一战》之后暗示自己已经不再饰演金刚狼，但后来又收回这个说法，与Ryan Reynolds饰演的死侍一同回归。当然，《死侍与金刚狼》后来为漫威拿下超过10亿美元票房，按当前汇率约合人民币68亿元，主演Ryan Reynolds也已经谈到自己对一部团队式后续作品有想法。所以，Logan版金刚狼当然很可能还会回到局中。

paragraphs.en: But where does this leave Marvel's X-Men reboot, which is currently scheduled to arrive early in the next MCU saga following Secret Wars (which itself is set for December 2027)? As a reboot, perhaps it will simply not feature the Wolverine character to avoid having two versions of the hero active within MCU continuity at the same time.
paragraphs.cn: 但这会让漫威的《X战警》重启处在什么位置？该重启目前计划在《秘密战争》之后的下一个MCU篇章早期登场，而《秘密战争》本身定于2027年12月上映。既然是重启，也许它会干脆不让金刚狼这个角色登场，以避免MCU连续性中同时存在两个版本的同一英雄。

paragraphs.en: Surely, though, there will come a day where Jackman does hand over the Wolverine baton. Asked if he had any advice for any potential successor, the Australian actor suggested that any new version would likely be "melding in" with his own take, but that he'd hope the actor was allowed to do "whatever the f*** they want."
paragraphs.cn: 不过，杰克曼终究会有交出金刚狼接力棒的一天。当被问到是否有什么建议给潜在继任者时，这位澳大利亚演员表示，任何新版本很可能都会以某种方式「融入」他自己的诠释，但他希望那位演员被允许去做「他们他妈想做的任何事」。

paragraphs.en: "I'm not going to say anything to whoever plays him," Jackson stated, "'cause no one said anything to me, which I really am thrilled about. And I had not read the comics, so I was just coming to it fresh. And I learned a lot over the years.
paragraphs.cn: 杰克曼说：「我不会对任何饰演他的人说什么，因为当年也没人对我说什么，而我对此真的很高兴。我当时也没读过漫画，所以我是以全新的状态进入这个角色的。这些年来我学到了很多。」

paragraphs.en: "Of course I've got my own take, but it must be melding in with me in some way," he continued. "I hope someone just comes in and does whatever the f*** they want and makes it their own."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说：「当然，我有自己的理解，但它一定会以某种方式和我融在一起。我希望有人就这么进来，去做他们他妈想做的任何事，并把它变成自己的东西。」

paragraphs.en: Image credit: John Nacion/Variety via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 图片来源：John Nacion/Variety via Getty Images。
